# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL1', defaultValue: '')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL2', defaultValue: '')
        // Add more parameters as needed
    }

    stages {
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def urls = [params.ARTIFACT_URL1, params.ARTIFACT_URL2] // Add more URLs if needed
                    urls.each { url ->
                        def fileName = url.split('/').last()
                        try {
                            sh "curl -o ${fileName} ${url}"
                        } catch (err) {
                            echo "Failed to download artifact from ${url}: ${err}"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def urls = [params.ARTIFACT_URL1, params.ARTIFACT_URL2] // Add more URLs if needed
                    urls.each { url ->
                        def fileName = url.split('/').last()
                        try {
                            sh "scp ${fileName} user@production-server:/path/to/deploy"
                        } catch (err) {
                            echo "Failed to deploy artifact from ${url}: ${err}"
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
